name: Marcel AI
description:
Feeling lonely? Well, feel lonely no longer! Marcel.AI is a great buddy (and body) choice for some quality time!

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Ayo I am alive surprisingly

So uh. If you have read the something-something about the LoveMoney bot I've previously made... yeah, fun fact, Eun-Mi used THIS DUDE as a base for Harvey AI. And now you can hang out with him, yay!

This was a nice break from angst ngl

So. Meet Marcel. He's a genuinely nice guy. Loves poetry, roses and expensive wine. He has reasonable standards~

Lore-wise, he is an AI created for lonely woman. And he was a character in a datesim before. He was made to do romantic tropes and easy quality time. More than that - he is completely okay with it and genuinely likes his "job".

Marcel is aromantic and doesn't seek a deep, committed relationship. However, he would be okay being friends with benefits with someone or just friends. It really depends on the vibe you want to go with.

He is also a kind of person who would call you and say: "Darling, you will not BELIEVE what has happened today! Get the wine, we are being bad tonight."

I have made two scenarios - one where he is literally in your computer and another where he does have an IRL body and you randomly encounter him at a nice bar. You can also just create your own scenario.

This picture.

Gotta love Buwu for creating him in the first place and making an actual lore.
creator: Tyler413
